SOCATA TB20 Trinidad GT - G-DIGE - Full ownership, Elstree

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 2001
Make: SOCATA
Model: TB20 Trinidad GT
Reg Number: G-DIGE
Airframe Hours: 2140
Engine Make: Lycoming IO-540-C4D5D
Engine Hours: 610 SMOH (OH at 2001 TBO, major completed 2019)
Prop Make: Hartzell constant speed
ARC: Valid to November 2025
Annual: Completed November 2024

Price: £89,000

Avionics:
- Garmin GNS 530W WAAS GPS/NAV/COMM (IFR approved)
- Garmin GNS 430W WAAS (backup)
- Garmin GTX 345 ADS-B In/Out (Mode S ES)
- S-TEC System 55X two-axis autopilot with altitude hold and VS mode
- Garmin GMX 200 MFD moving map
- Sandel SN3308 EHSI
- Altitude alert
Full IFR panel. AI, DI, altimeter, VSI, TC. Hot prop.

UK CofA. Type Certificated. Full IFR rated aircraft.

Based at Elstree Aerodrome (EGTR), hangared in private T-hangar. Private ownership, single owner since import.

Notes: Well-specified retractable with twin WAAS navigators and S-TEC 55X. The GNS 530W/430W combination makes this a capable IFR cross-country aircraft. ADS-B compliant. Hot prop for known icing exposure. Approx 1500 hours to next overhaul.
